subject: English
chapter_name: Verghese Kurien—I Too Had A Dream
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the life journey and contributions of Verghese Kurien
Analyse the importance of the White Revolution in India
Understand how cooperative movements benefit farmers
Identify leadership qualities shown by Verghese Kurien
Develop analytical thinking through discussion and comparison
Improve reading comprehension, vocabulary, and writing skills

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Dreams and Leadership
topics_covered: Importance of leadership in social change
teaching_strategy: Brainstorming session on qualities of great leaders
student_activities: List qualities of a successful leader
Discuss how dreams can lead to achievements

lesson_plan.title: Early Life and Career of Verghese Kurien
topics_covered: His arrival at Anand in Gujarat
Beginning of his work in the dairy sector
student_activities: Create a timeline of Kurien’s early life
Identify important turning points in his career

lesson_plan.title: Understanding the White Revolution
topics_covered: Meaning and goals of the White Revolution
teaching_strategy: Discussion about milk production in India
student_activities: Explain how dairy cooperatives help farmers
Write key points about Operation Flood

lesson_plan.title: Leadership and Problem Solving
student_activities: Analyse how Kurien solved farmers’ problems

lesson_plan.title: Impact of the White Revolution
student_activities: Write a short paragraph about how the White Revolution helped farmers

teaching_aids: Chart showing the dairy cooperative system
Map of India showing major dairy regions
teacher_tip: Encourage students to connect the chapter with real-life examples such as the AMUL dairy cooperative. This helps them understand how leadership and cooperation can transform society.
